prestazioni: Engine swap to a 4A-GE 20V 'Silver Top' (AE101/111) with a Tomei 264° camshaft kit, HKS 272° adjustable cam gears, and a custom 4-2-1 stainless steel header by Trust/GReddy for optimized scavenging on the 7,600 RPM redline

Forced induction via a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.64 A/R turbine housing) paired with a Tomei M82 cast manifold, custom 3-inch downpipe by HKS, and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller targeting 1.2 bar (17.4 psi) on 98 RON fuel with a custom ECU map via Haltech Elite 2500

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valving for the FX-GT's 2,430mm wheelbase), Cusco 22mm front sway bar, and Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (18mm), paired with polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0115) for the front control arms
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (FX-GT-specific fitment) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, extended 30mm per side for 245/40R16 Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires on Work Meister S1 3P 16x9 +15 wheels

Custom front bumper lip by Vertex (FX-GT-specific mold) with integrated DRLs using Philips X-tremeUltinon LED bulbs (6000K), paired with a Seibon carbon fiber hood (AE101/111 pattern) featuring a 30mm vent for heat extraction

Interior retrim with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (FX-GT floorpan-specific mounts), Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses, and a custom MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm diameter) wrapped in Alcantara with a quick-release hub by NRG Innovations
